sections.paragraph:
ψίξ, χός, ἡ (ψίω, of infants ‘feed on morsels or milk’; Plut., Aretaeus p. 142, 23; 167, 17; Herodian Gr. I 396, 22 al.; Rhet. Gr. I 646, 16) bit, crumb, esp. of bread Mt 15:27 D; Lk 16:21 D.—DELG s.v. ψίω.

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Aretaeus Aretaeus , II a.d.—List 5

Herodian Herodian = Herodianus Historicus, III a.d.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

esp. esp. = especially

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1098
